amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 5 — paragraph 1 — point d — point ii
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 5 — paragraph 1 — point d — point ii

## Text proposed by the Commission

(ii) the prevention of a specific, substantial and imminent threat to the life or physical safety of natural persons or of a terrorist attack;

(ii)
